name: QNI : File Extension / Content Type Verification
notes:
This rule extracts the file extension from the file name, and compares it with the content type as determined by QNI. 
These two values are then compared against the reference set "QNI-Extension-ContentType-Pairs", which holds expected file extension/content type pairs.

This rule triggers on cases where a file extension is in disagreement with the usually accepted Content-Type for the extension, and the extension is not contained in the "QNI : File Extension / Content Type Verification Exclusions" reference set.

As an example, the file extension ".txt" is generally associated with "text/plain" and not "application/x-dosexec".

By default this rule does not create offenses. To view the flows that triggered this rule, use the search "File Extension / Content Type Mismatches".
conditions_text: when the flow matches File Name is not N/A, Content Type is not N/A

when the flow matches STRPOS("file name",'.') >= 0 and not ("file name" MATCHES 'POST_.*') and not REFERENCESETCONTAINS('QNI : File Extension / Content Type Verification Exclusions',LOWER(QNI::GET_EXTENSION("file name"))) and not REFERENCEMAPSETCONTAINS('QNI-Extension-ContentType-Pairs',LOWER(QNI::GET_EXTENSION("file name")),"content type") AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY QNI : File Extension / Content Type Verification on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow matches File Name is not N/A, Content Type is not N/A

AND when the flow matches STRPOS("file name",'.') >= 0 and not ("file name" MATCHES 'POST_.*') and not REFERENCESETCONTAINS('QNI : File Extension / Content Type Verification Exclusions',LOWER(QNI::GET_EXTENSION("file name"))) and not REFERENCEMAPSETCONTAINS('QNI-Extension-ContentType-Pairs',LOWER(QNI::GET_EXTENSION("file name")),"content type") AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: QNI : File Extension / Content Type Verification
Event description: Detects mismatched file extension and analyzed content-type.
